title: Challenge
description: A specific task within an interactive assessment with discrete validation goals. Challenges are stored in numbered directories within assessments (e.g., assessments/01-assessment-name/01-challenge-name/). Each challenge directory must contain: challenge.yaml, description.md, and successMessage.md.

code.description: Semantic identifier for this challenge (e.g., 'DeployToStaging', 'TestChallenge'). Must start and end with alphanumeric, can contain hyphens. This code is referenced by validator services to track challenge completion.

title.description: Display name for the challenge shown in the UI.

goals.description: Array of validation goals that must be completed for this challenge. Each goal represents a discrete validation checkpoint.

estimatedDuration.description: Optional estimated time to complete this challenge (e.g., '15m', '1h').

video.description: Optional URL to a video resource providing challenge-specific guidance.

goals.title: Create workflow file
goals.description: Add a GitHub Actions workflow file

goals.title: Application deployed
goals.description: Verify the app is accessible in staging
